validationSettings._unusuallyHighQuantityThreshold_note: Set to null until real operational data establishes a meaningful threshold. Enable R007 and set this value once actual order-volume data is available.

parserSettings._catalogOverridesHeuristics_note: When true, the product catalog's caseOnly/allowUnitPicking flags always take precedence over name-based heuristics (1/N pattern and (N) pattern). Set to false only if the name patterns should override catalog entries.

rules.description: Enforce case/unit separation per product rules. Case-only products must not have unit = 'unit'.
Product must be resolvable in the product catalog.
Warn when OCR confidence is below the threshold.
Warn when the same product+unit combination appears more than once on the same page.
Warn when an aggregated product has both cases = 0 and units = 0.
Disabled until real operational order-volume data is available. Enable this rule and set a meaningful threshold before production use. Do not use an arbitrary default.
Products whose names contain a fraction pattern (1/N) are full-case only. Overridden by the product catalog caseOnly flag when parserSettings.catalogOverridesHeuristics is true.

Products whose names contain a parenthesised unit count may allow individual-unit picking per product rules. Overridden by the product catalog allowUnitPicking flag when parserSettings.catalogOverridesHeuristics is true.

When a resolved product entry exists in the catalog, its caseOnly and allowUnitPicking flags take precedence over name-based heuristics (R008, R009). Name heuristics are applied only when no catalog entry is found.
